handoffs.analyze:
**Phase: Parallel Per-Ticker Analysis — COMPLETE**

All 9 active-position cards written to `morning-work/`:

| Ticker | Verdict | Rule | Key Reason |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| NU | **HOLD** | Rule 2 | GATED (3d to earnings), P/L -10.4%, still building (1/5 bullets) |
| STIM | **MONITOR** | Rule 16 | WITHIN time stop, P/L -11.6%, earnings CLEAR (22d) |
| IONQ | **HOLD** | Rule 5 | Recovery + GATED (3d) + no thesis + P/L ≤ -10% |
| UAMY | **MONITOR** | Rule 10 | Recovery + mixed signals (above SMA50/200, below EMAs) |
| USAR | **MONITOR** | Rule 9 | Recovery + bearish across all indicators |
| INTC | **HOLD** | Rule 10 | Recovery + neutral-bearish (RSI 44.6, not conclusively bearish) |
| APLD | **MONITOR** | Rule 16 | WITHIN time stop (5d), P/L -10.9%, earnings CLEAR |
| CIFR | **HOLD** | Rule 2 | GATED (2d to earnings), P/L -1.5% (negative); agent flagged sell alert near day high |
| CLSK | **MONITOR** | Rule 16 | WITHIN time stop (3d), P/L +5.9%, earnings CLEAR |

**Notable flags:**
- NU + IONQ + CIFR: all GATED with earnings Feb 25 — all BUY orders PAUSED
- CIFR: sell order ($16.36) near fill — day high $16.18 cleared 2% alert threshold
- INTC: Reserve bullets ($37.56, $36.38) near current price ($36.38 = exact match) — watch for fill
